{"units": [{"unit_key":"unit-002","status":"generated","declaration_names":["fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff_field"],"lean_file_body":"variable {K : Type*} [Field K]

open PowerSeries

theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff_field (a : PowerSeries K) :
    IsUnit a ↔ constantCoeff a ≠ 0 := by
  rw [fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact IsUnit.ne_zero h
  · intro h
    exact Ne.isUnit h
","notes":["Uses the prior project theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff (IsUnit a ↔ IsUnit (constantCoeff a)). Over a field, an element is a unit iff it is nonzero, so we convert IsUnit (constantCoeff a) ↔ constantCoeff a ≠ 0 using IsUnit.ne_zero and Ne.isUnit."],"used_context":["AlgebraicCombinatorics.fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff","IsUnit.ne_zero","Ne.isUnit","Field K","PowerSeries"]}]}
